---
layout: cv
title: Lexi Soelberg's CV
---
# Lexi Soelberg
Psychology (Health) Student, Statistics Student

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="soe21001@byui.edu">soe21001@byui.edu</a>
| This is my website


## Currently

Attending Brigham Young University - Idaho

### Specialized in

Research, Psychology, Social Psychology, Health Psychology, data visualizations, graphing data, cleaning data, presenting research


### Research interests

Women health & mental health, hormones & behavior, biopsychosocial model of behavior, theories of behavior, systems theories


## Education

`Sept 2021 - now`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__


## Awards

`2025-2026`
President, *Health Psych Society*, Rexburg, ID



## Publications

### Journals

`2026`
College Student Influenza and COVID-19 Vaccination Attitudes and Uptake Behavior: Prevalence, Correlates, and Promoting Improvement

[COVID](https://www.mdpi.com/journal/covid/sections/COVID_Public_Health_and_Epidemiology)  |  [Article](https://www.preprints.org/manuscript/202603.0059)


## Occupation

`2025-2026`
__Health Psych Teaching Assistant__, Rexburg, ID


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
